name: Content Creation with Spillovers: An Incentive Design Approach

description: arXiv:2603.14372v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The rise of AI amplifies the economic phenomenon of \emph{positive spillovers}: when creators contribute content that can be reused and adapted by LLMs, one creator's effort may improve the content quality of others through recombination. While such spillovers can improve content quality, they also reshape incentives, as creators may reduce ef...
author: Sagi Ohayon, Boaz Taitler, Omer Ben-Porat
